video:video.video:title: Top 5 Pelvic Floor Exercises for Women
video:video.video:description: A comprehensive video guide to the top 5 pelvic floor exercises for women, taught by Sheree DiBiase, PT.

video:video.video:title: Top 5 Pelvic Floor Exercises for Urinary Incontinence Relief
video:video.video:description: A comprehensive video guide to the top 5 pelvic floor exercises for urinary incontinence, taught by Sheree DiBiase, PT.

video:video.video:title: Pelvic Floor Exercises for Incontinence: 10-Minute Chair Routine
video:video.video:description: A guided 10-minute chair-based pelvic floor exercise routine designed to help manage urinary incontinence, taught by Sheree DiBiase, PT.

video:video.video:title: Pelvic Floor Exercises for Prolapse
video:video.video:description: An expert guide to safe and effective pelvic floor exercises for pelvic organ prolapse, taught by Sheree DiBiase, PT.

video:video.video:title: Pelvic Floor Exercises for Vaginismus
video:video.video:description: A gentle guide to pelvic floor relaxation exercises for vaginismus relief, taught by Sheree DiBiase, PT.

video:video.video:title: Standing Pelvic Floor Exercises for Prolapse Relief
video:video.video:description: A video guide to standing pelvic floor exercises for prolapse relief, taught by Sheree DiBiase, PT.

video:video.video:title: Pelvic Floor Exercises for Pregnant Women
video:video.video:description: A comprehensive video guide to safe pelvic floor exercises during pregnancy, taught by Sheree DiBiase, PT.

video:video.video:title: Is Your Pelvic Floor Too Tight or Too Weak?
video:video.video:description: A video guide to help you determine whether your pelvic floor is hypertonic (too tight) or hypotonic (too weak), with self-assessment tips from Sheree DiBiase, PT.

video:video.video:title: Pelvic Floor Exercises Better Than Kegels
video:video.video:description: An expert video guide demonstrating pelvic floor exercises that go beyond traditional Kegels, taught by Sheree DiBiase, PT.

video:video.video:title: Lymphedema After Breast Cancer Surgery: What You Need to Know
video:video.video:description: A comprehensive video about lymphedema risk, prevention, and management after breast cancer surgery, by Sheree DiBiase, PT.

video:video.video:title: How Do I Know If I'm in Perimenopause? Signs & Symptoms
video:video.video:description: A comprehensive video explaining perimenopause signs, symptoms, and management strategies, by Sheree DiBiase, PT.

video:video.video:title: Manual Lymph Drainage: Essential Technique Guide
video:video.video:description: A comprehensive video guide to manual lymph drainage technique, taught by Sheree DiBiase, PT.

video:video.video:title: Easy Gentle Exercises After Breast Surgery
video:video.video:description: A comprehensive video guide to safe, gentle exercises after breast surgery, taught by Sheree DiBiase, PT.

video:video.video:title: Best Labor Positions for Each Stage of Birth
video:video.video:description: A comprehensive video guide to the best labor positions for every stage of birth, taught by Sheree DiBiase, PT.

video:video.video:title: Hip Rotation Exercises for Pelvic Floor Strength
video:video.video:description: An expert video guide to hip rotation exercises that strengthen the pelvic floor, taught by Sheree DiBiase, PT.

video:video.video:title: Third Trimester Pelvic Floor Exercises
video:video.video:description: A comprehensive video guide to third trimester pelvic floor exercises, taught by Sheree DiBiase, PT. Safe exercises to prepare your body for labor and delivery.

video:video.video:title: All Fours Position for Labor & Delivery
video:video.video:description: A comprehensive video guide to using the all fours position during labor, taught by Sheree DiBiase, PT.

video:video.video:title: Hip Flexor Stretches for Labor Prep
video:video.video:description: A comprehensive video guide to hip flexor stretches for labor preparation, taught by Sheree DiBiase, PT.

video:video.video:title: Exercise Ball Workout for Pregnancy
video:video.video:description: A comprehensive video guide to exercise ball workouts during pregnancy, taught by Sheree DiBiase, PT.

video:video.video:title: Deep Squat for Pregnancy
video:video.video:description: A comprehensive video guide to safe deep squatting during pregnancy, taught by Sheree DiBiase, PT.

video:video.video:title: Perimenopause Signs & Symptoms: Pelvic Floor Health
video:video.video:description: An expert video guide on how perimenopause signs and symptoms affect pelvic floor health, taught by Sheree DiBiase, PT.

video:video.video:title: Does a Weak Pelvic Floor Cause Incontinence?
video:video.video:description: Pelvic floor physical therapist Sheree DiBiase answers the question: does a weak pelvic floor cause incontinence? Learn the connection between pelvic floor weakness and bladder leakage.

video:video.video:title: Can Pelvic Floor Exercises Help with Incontinence?
video:video.video:description: Pelvic floor physical therapist Sheree DiBiase explains how pelvic floor exercises help reduce and eliminate incontinence, including techniques for different muscle imbalances.

video:video.video:title: Can Pelvic Floor Exercises Make Incontinence Worse?
video:video.video:description: Pelvic floor physical therapist Sheree DiBiase explains why pelvic floor exercises can sometimes worsen incontinence and what to do about it.
